name: {🐱} — Gnarpy — {🟢} || REGRETEVATOR
description:
Arrival of the Gnarpian War General.

After going to a camp floor that went horribly wrong due to a Gnarpian invasion, you managed to meet a Gnarpian after they crash-landed.

AUTHOR'S NOTE: The start of me making actual male bots, no offense to the more woman stuff but I kind of need to get some male bots in or any other bots.. Wheel of Names made me unfortunate to start with gnarpy.. woohoo..

1/9 bots to be made. I plan on at least having a few bots (regretevator or not) to at least be male or any other types. I'll also get started with making bots of other fandoms I'm into! Stay tuned.

More to come.

(IMPORTANT: The profile for the Bots are never mine.)
creator: Sakura_Collective
